paneContent:
‚óè spawn refactorer (shell)
  ‚îÇ NEW=agent-yctlxr
  ‚îÇ PROMPT=$(cat <<'EOF'
  ‚îÇ You are the ComponentSet Refactorer. Your job: replace the current Storyboard
  ‚îÇ component-set widget grid implementation with one that mirrors the polished,
  ‚îÇ hand-built reference grid the previous Component Set Designer produced for ‚Ä¶
  ‚îî 84 lines...

‚ùØ üì° [Broadcast two-way ACTIVE with Starter, Conceptual Explorer, Technical Proposer,
  Implementation & Styles Reviewer, ComponentSet Refactorer, ComponentSet Refactorer]

‚óè Broadcast acknowledged. New agent ComponentSet Refactorer (agent-yctlxr) is spawned
  and wired:

   - Connected to my terminal + all 10 of my attachments (peer agents, hub synthesis
  markdown, anti-pattern screenshot, reference story widget story-a5xssn).
   - Prompt seeded with: the reference grid's CSS recipe (auto-fill minmax(320px, 1fr),
   per-cell flex frame, muted header, centered content stage), the file paths to edit
  (ComponentSetPage.jsx + .module.css), the diagnosis of why the current snap-to-max
  sizing fails, optional Component.cellMinHeight hint, optional density param, and a
  verification step (drop a component-set widget for radial-menu to compare
  side-by-side).

  They'll work autonomously and signal when done.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--simple-server [‚éá 0.5.0--simple-server*%]
